channel.title: WordPress.org Forums » [Wordfence Security - Firewall, Malware Scan, and Login Security] Reviews

item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Since I use it we have no problems.

item.dc:creator: cherifiy
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

The login security, firewall, and real time alerts make it easy to spot and stop suspicious activity before it becomes a problem

Rating: 5 stars

Many thanks to the Wordfence team for the peace of mind they give me and the unconditional support.

item.title: Secure (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: shodjaziba
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

This is the most and best plugin to secure your website

item.title: Go for it and buy the license ! (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: ulrichgenisson
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

After testing SecuPress twice, which is a nightmare—a ghost security plugin with no support whatsoever (in the paid version)—I installed WordFence! Simple, powerful, and effective! I have nothing but praise: go for it and buy the license; you’ll have everything you need to secure your WordPress site.

item.title: Great Security Support for Plugin Developers (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: Sanjeev Kumar
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

We truly appreciate the support and responsible work done by the Wordfence team.

At Magazine3, we maintain several WordPress plugins, and security is a top priority for us. Wordfence has helped us multiple times by responsibly reporting potential vulnerabilities in our plugins. Their reports are always clear and detailed, which allows our team to quickly understand the issue and release fixes promptly.

Their professional and collaborative approach helps plugin developers like us keep our products secure and reliable for all users. We’re grateful for their efforts in making the WordPress ecosystem safer.

Team Magazine3

item.title: The ultimate shield for my website! (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: manos555
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Wordfence is the first plugin I install on My project.
Even without being a security expert, the interface is clear and the setup is straightforward.
It’s powerful, reliable, and the ultimate security shield that keeping all the “bad guys” away.
5 stars are the least I can do! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Rating: 5 stars

best security i have saved from approx dily 10+ malwair try to aatack but thanks woardfence team for save me

item.title: Simple – Easy for client and agency (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: Larry Davis
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

IT works !- we use the free version on many sites and when higher traffic or targeted websites demand more tools then we install the Premium – worth every dime (we develop and host all our sites thru WP Engine and it works great in that enviro )

item.title: Thank you wordfence (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: DoctorsDome.center

Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

And for your excellent software!

item.title: protects simply (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: guspi
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

simple interface and all automatic

item.title: look no further for a firewall (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: austinthor
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Wordfence is an intuitive and powerful plugin with stellar support. They are continuously updating it and communicating with end users. They have helped me through a hack (It was my fault–not a failed firewall) and the bazillion questions (for weeks) that followed. They have helped me through ensuring my test site is secure. The engineers are thorough, knowledgable, and responsive. I have the Premium version and highly recommend. I cannot recommend Wordfence more highly.

item.title: A Gold Standard (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: gregorycrafts
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Love Wordfence. It’s installed on all of my websites.

item.title: Good !!!!!!!! (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: redee
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Very helped ! Thank you !

item.title: OMG Awesome! (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: sadduck
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Before installing Wordfence, I was having several issues with the most annoying being someone randomly creating bogus accounts. Along with an incredible number of bots. I run a small site marketing to a small select group of customers. After installation, about a week and a half ago, ZERO bogus accounts and an incredible amount of blocks for what I consider a small unknown platform. Wow! It’s just mind blowing how much I can get done in the day when I don’t have to constantly monitor and keep the website, and my server, clean! This program worked right out of the box with minimum setup and seems to be doing everything I could have asked for, and more! Could not be more pleased and would recommend to anyone that asked!

item.title: Clear and simple (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: antoineedlm
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Eazy to use and efficient!

item.title: Peace of mind (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: magilla07
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

I trust Wordfence is protecting my sites and I’ve invested in the pro version for the most critical uses. The degree of customisation is advanced and let’s me contour the protection and notifications to my needs.

item.title: Difficult uninstall (4 stars)
item.dc:creator: thatllbetheday
item.description:
Replies: 2

Rating: 4 stars

The plugin left its login security option on the WP menu even after uninstalling. I had to manually search the database in myphpadmin to get rid of everything.

  • This topic was modified 3 weeks ago by thatllbetheday.

very very great!

item.title: Best in class (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: dosolutions
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Of the 30 sites I manage, all of them are protected by WordFence. I consider it by far better than the rest.

item.title: Saved me from so many headaches (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: davidwbritt
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

I have a handful of sites that I’ve had to clean of malware over the years and Wordfence put a stop to all of that. Now it’s the first plugin I install, every time.

item.title: It’s amazing to have a tool this good for free (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: matutino
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Thank you Wordfence team for giving such a great tool to us all for free!

item.title: 24/7 protection without bugging me! (5 stars)
item.dc:creator: Jackson Pemberton
item.description:
Replies: 1

Rating: 5 stars

Has kept my websites save for at least 10 years, 24/7. Comprehensive, good UX, does the job without bugging me.
